text:
Once upon a time, there was a little bunny named Pip. Pip loved to hop. It made him happy. He had dreams big dreams. He wanted to become a starflyer!

One summer night Pip did something magical. He hopped outside in his twinkling green jersey. The moon shone bright. Pip danced. He jumped. He twitted softly, twinkling.

But suddenly... SPLASH!

Pip had fallen into a swamp! It was dark. There was nothing sweet. And then...

BLOOP! Pip bounced out!

The river sang ribbons. Pip found a spider web. It glowed fairy lights! He climbed. Soon he found moonbeams leading him home.

Pip slept soft and sweetly. Next spring he'd dream big again.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
